metaTitle: Custom Wedding Embroidery – Personalized Couple Gift
metaDescription: Celebrate your love with a custom wedding embroidery. Personalize with names & dates. Silk thread, bamboo hoop. Perfect wedding or anniversary gift. Order now!
shortDescription: Hand-embroidered silk & cotton art in a bamboo hoop, personalized with your names, date, or vows. A timeless wedding gift.
fullDescription:
**Celebrate Your Love Story with a Handcrafted Masterpiece**

Make your wedding or anniversary truly unforgettable with our **Custom Wedding Embroidery**. Each piece is meticulously hand-embroidered using premium **silk and cotton thread** on a natural **bamboo hoop** (8–10 inches in diameter). This isn’t just decor—it’s a heartfelt keepsake that captures your unique bond.

**Personalization Options:**
Choose from our curated templates or create your own design. Add your **names, wedding date, or a short vow** to make it uniquely yours. Perfect as a **wedding gift, anniversary surprise, or personalized couple gift** that will be treasured for years.

**Customization Process:**
1. Place your order with personalization details.
2. Our artisans hand-embroider your design with care.
3. Shipped within 10–14 days, ready to hang or display.

**Why Choose This?**
- **Emotional Hook:** A tangible symbol of your commitment, handmade with love.
- **Versatile Gift:** Ideal for weddings, anniversaries, housewarmings, or vow renewals.
- **Eco-Friendly:** Natural bamboo hoop and sustainable materials.

**Specifications:**
- **Size:** 8–10 inch diameter
- **Material:** Silk thread, cotton thread, bamboo hoop
- **Production Time:** 10–14 business days
- **Price:** $55 (includes personalization)

**Perfect For:**
- Wedding day decor or reception centerpieces
- Anniversary gift for couples
- Bridal shower or bachelorette party favor
- A romantic surprise for your partner

Order now and let your love bloom in stitches!

faq: Can I customize the text and design? Yes, you can add names, dates, or a short vow using our templates or your own idea.
What is the production time? Orders are handmade and shipped within 10–14 business days.
Is the bamboo hoop suitable for hanging? Yes, each hoop comes with a hanging loop for easy display.
